title: Moonkie Silicone Baby Food Storage Containers, 6 Pack, 120ml Weaning Freezer Pots with Airtight Lids, Reusable Baby Food Snack Pots, Microwave and Dishwasher Safe, Perfect for Infant & Toddler Food
features: 4OZ/120ML SILICONE BABY FOOD CONTAINERS - Make healthy, homemade baby food a breeze with our 6-pack of silicone baby food containers. Perfect for both storing breastmilk and introducing solid foods to little ones. Each baby food storage container has measurement markings and baby daycare labels, making portioning and labeling a cinch!

100% FOOD-GRADE SILICONE - Our 100% food-grade silicone baby food containers contain no fillers or harmful materials that could leach into your child’s food. Plus, they’re unbreakable - no more cracked baby food jars or spending money to replace them!

LEAKPROOF + DOUBLE SEAL LIDS WITH STEAM VENT - Keep baby food fresh with airtight double seal lids – food stays fresh and nutrients are locked in when you store our baby food jars in the refrigerator or freezer. Prepare multiple meals at one time and save for later without worrying about spoiled food! Heat food effortlessly without worrying about splatters. Just open the steam vent and pop it in the microwave!

MICROWAVE, FREEZER & DISHWASHER SAFE FOR EASY MEAL PREP - Safe for temperatures ranging from -4°F to 428°F, Moonkie silicone baby food containers are microwave, freezer, and dishwasher friendly. Cleaning is a breeze with the dishwasher. Unlike plastic or glass, Moonkie baby food containers are ultra-durable, resisting cracks and deformation-it never cracks, melts, or loses its shape in the dishwasher or the freezer!

ASTHESTIC PLEASING AND VERSATILE - With six color combinations to choose from, you can have fun with your opinionated toddler as they pick which multi-colored containers they want to eat from. As parents, you'll find our baby food containers incredibly practical. Moonkie baby food containers grow with your children and can be used well beyond the purée phase. Use them as a fun snack container, perfect for home, daycare, or on-the-go use.
description: Product Description SAFE & UNBREAKABLE Made of 100% food-grade silicone, Moonkie's baby food containers meet and exceed European and US Safety Standard for baby utensils. Ultra-durable and unbreakable silicone material-no more cracked food containers or spending money to replace them! INCLUDED WITH BABY DAYCARE LABELS Our silicone baby containers including a permanent marker pen and waterproof baby daycare labels for easy categorization and labeling. Exquisitely packaged, an ideal baby shower gift. MAKE MEAL PREP EASIER Say goodbye to time-consuming and messy meal prep with our innovative silicone baby food containers. Designed for busy parents like you, these containers make preparing homemade baby food a breeze. SUPERIOR FRESSNESS SEAL Keep baby food fresh with airtight double seal lids – food stays fresh and nutrients are locked in when you store our containers in the refrigerator or freezer. VERSATILE FOR EVERY FEEDING STAGE Moonkie baby food containers grow with your children and can be used well beyond the purée phase. Use these versatile containers to store purees, baby food, breastmilk, snack and more, perfect for home, daycare, or on-the-go use. MICROWAVE, FREEZER & DISHWASHER FRIENDLY Effortless heating in the microwave or steaming, and easy cleaning in the dishwasher. Our silicone baby food containers are very durable. Unlike plastic and glass ones, ours won’t have issues with the bottom cracking. Top concerns for these baby food storage container. Q: Will these containers leak when filled with liquid or when turned upside down? A: The lids have a double-seal design, and as long as they are properly sealed, there won't be any leaks when turned upside down. Q: What material is used for these containers? A: These baby food containers are made from 100% food-grade silicone. Q: Can these storage jars be steamed or microwaved? A: Of course. Just open the steam vent and pop it in the microwave ! Q: Can these containers be used to store or freeze breast milk? A: Yes, they can be stored or freezed breast milk, fruit juice and other liquid foods.
